description: Transfer data from or to a server using URLs, supporting numerous protocols.
_coverage: partial: [--help, --manual, --version (meta flags not useful in GUI)]

arguments.name: Abstract Unix Socket
arguments.description: Connect via abstract Unix domain socket

arguments.name: Alt Svc
arguments.description: Enable alt-svc with this cache file

arguments.name: Append
arguments.description: Append to target file when uploading

arguments.name: Ca Native
arguments.description: Load CA certs from the OS

arguments.name: Cacert
arguments.description: CA certificate to verify peer against

arguments.name: Capath
arguments.description: CA directory to verify peer against

arguments.name: Connect To
arguments.description: Connect to host2 instead of host1

arguments.name: Cookie
arguments.description: Send cookies from string/load from file

arguments.name: Crlf
arguments.description: Convert LF to CRLF in upload

arguments.name: Curves
arguments.description: (EC) TLS key exchange algorithms to request

arguments.name: Dns Interface
arguments.description: Interface to use for DNS requests

arguments.name: Dns Ipv4 Addr
arguments.description: IPv4 address to use for DNS requests

arguments.name: Dns Ipv6 Addr
arguments.description: IPv6 address to use for DNS requests

arguments.name: Doh Cert Status
arguments.description: Verify DoH server cert status OCSP-staple

arguments.name: Dump Ca Embed
arguments.description: Write the embedded CA bundle to standard output

arguments.name: Egd File
arguments.description: EGD socket path for random data

arguments.name: Etag Save
arguments.description: Parse incoming ETag and save to a file

arguments.name: Fail
arguments.description: Fail fast with no output on HTTP errors

arguments.name: Fail With Body
arguments.description: Fail on HTTP errors but save the body

arguments.name: Ftp Create Dirs
arguments.description: Create the remote dirs if not present

arguments.name: Ftp Skip Pasv Ip
arguments.description: Skip the IP address for PASV

arguments.name: Ftp Ssl Control
arguments.description: Require TLS for login, clear for transfer

arguments.name: Get
arguments.description: Put the post data in the URL and use GET

arguments.name: Haproxy Protocol
arguments.description: Send HAProxy PROXY protocol v1 header

arguments.name: Hostpubmd5
arguments.description: Acceptable MD5 hash of host public key

arguments.name: Hostpubsha256
arguments.description: Acceptable SHA256 hash of host public key

arguments.name: Hsts
arguments.description: Enable HSTS with this cache file

arguments.name: Ignore Content Length
arguments.description: Ignore the size of the remote resource

arguments.name: Ip Tos
arguments.description: Set IP Type of Service or Traffic Class

arguments.name: Junk Session Cookies
arguments.description: Ignore session cookies read from file

arguments.name: Libcurl
arguments.description: Generate libcurl code for this command line

arguments.name: Local Port
arguments.description: Use a local port number within RANGE

arguments.name: Location Trusted
arguments.description: As --location, but send secrets to other hosts

arguments.name: Mail Auth
arguments.description: Originator address of the original email

arguments.name: Mail Rcpt Allowfails
arguments.description: Allow RCPT TO command to fail

arguments.name: Metalink
arguments.description: Process given URLs as metalink XML file

arguments.name: Netrc
arguments.description: Must read .netrc for username and password

arguments.name: Next
arguments.description: Make next URL use separate options

arguments.name: No Buffer
arguments.description: Disable buffering of the output stream

arguments.name: No Clobber
arguments.description: Do not overwrite files that already exist

arguments.name: No Keepalive
arguments.description: Disable TCP keepalive on the connection

arguments.name: No Progress Meter
arguments.description: Do not show the progress meter

arguments.name: Noproxy
arguments.description: List of hosts which do not use proxy

arguments.name: Out Null
arguments.description: Discard response data into the void

arguments.name: Output
arguments.description: Write to file instead of stdout

arguments.name: Parallel Max Host
arguments.description: Maximum connections to a single host

arguments.name: Path As Is
arguments.description: Do not squash .. sequences in URL path

arguments.name: Pinnedpubkey
arguments.description: Public key to verify peer against

arguments.name: Post301
arguments.description: Do not switch to GET after a 301 redirect

arguments.name: Post302
arguments.description: Do not switch to GET after a 302 redirect

arguments.name: Post303
arguments.description: Do not switch to GET after a 303 redirect

arguments.name: Progress Bar
arguments.description: Display transfer progress as a bar

arguments.name: Proto Default
arguments.description: Use PROTOCOL for any URL missing a scheme

arguments.name: Proxy Basic
arguments.description: Use Basic authentication on the proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Ca Native
arguments.description: Load CA certs from the OS to verify proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Cacert
arguments.description: CA certificates to verify proxy against

arguments.name: Proxy Capath
arguments.description: CA directory to verify proxy against

arguments.name: Proxy Cert Type
arguments.description: Client certificate type for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Ciphers
arguments.description: TLS 1.2 (1.1, 1.0) ciphers to use for proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Crlfile
arguments.description: Set a CRL list for proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Key Type
arguments.description: Private key file type for proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Negotiate
arguments.description: HTTP Negotiate (SPNEGO) auth with the proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Pass
arguments.description: Passphrase for private key for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Pinnedpubkey
arguments.description: FILE/HASHES public key to verify proxy with

arguments.name: Proxy Ssl Allow Beast
arguments.description: Allow this security flaw for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy Tlsauthtype
arguments.description: TLS authentication type for HTTPS proxy

arguments.name: Proxy1 0
arguments.description: Use HTTP/1.0 proxy on given port

arguments.name: Quote
arguments.description: Send command(s) to server before transfer

arguments.name: Random File
arguments.description: File for reading random data from

arguments.name: Range
arguments.description: Retrieve only the bytes within RANGE

arguments.name: Raw
arguments.description: Do HTTP raw; no transfer decoding

arguments.name: Remote Name
arguments.description: Write output to file named as remote file

arguments.name: Remote Name All
arguments.description: Use the remote filename for all URLs

arguments.name: Remote Time
arguments.description: Set remote file's time on local output

arguments.name: Request Target
arguments.description: Specify the target for this request

arguments.name: Retry
arguments.description: Retry request if transient problems occur

arguments.name: Show Error
arguments.description: Show error even when -s is used

arguments.name: Skip Existing
arguments.description: Skip download if local file already exists

arguments.name: Socks4
arguments.description: SOCKS4 proxy on given host + port

arguments.name: Socks4A
arguments.description: SOCKS4a proxy on given host + port

arguments.name: Socks5
arguments.description: SOCKS5 proxy on given host + port

arguments.name: Socks5 Gssapi
arguments.description: Enable GSS-API auth for SOCKS5 proxies

arguments.name: Socks5 Gssapi Service
arguments.description: SOCKS5 proxy service name for GSS-API

arguments.name: Socks5 Hostname
arguments.description: SOCKS5 proxy, pass hostname to proxy

arguments.name: Ssl Allow Beast
arguments.description: Allow security flaw to improve interop

arguments.name: Ssl Revoke Best Effort
arguments.description: Ignore missing cert CRL dist points

arguments.name: Ssl Sessions
arguments.description: Load/save SSL session tickets from/to this file

arguments.name: Styled Output
arguments.description: Enable styled output for HTTP headers

arguments.name: Tftp No Options
arguments.description: Do not send any TFTP options

arguments.name: Time Cond
arguments.description: Transfer based on a time condition

arguments.name: Tls Earlydata
arguments.description: Allow use of TLSv1.3 early data (0RTT)

arguments.name: Trace
arguments.description: Write a debug trace to FILE

arguments.name: Trace Config
arguments.description: Details to log in trace/verbose output

arguments.name: Trace Ids
arguments.description: Transfer + connection ids in verbose output

arguments.name: Trace Time
arguments.description: Add time stamps to trace/verbose output

arguments.name: Unix Socket
arguments.description: Connect through this Unix domain socket

arguments.name: Xattr
arguments.description: Store metadata in extended file attributes
